value:
Ladies and gentlemen!
It's the moment you've been waiting for!
At last, the Master League Gundam Fight is here!

In the Master League, your assembled squad will be
pitted against other fighters in the same league!

As the name suggests, you will have to fight, fight,
and fight some more...

Can you raise your league score high enough to
earn a promotion to the next league?

As you climb your way up the leagues,
increasingly spectacular awards await...
This is truly an event where dreams are made!

Now, then, if you want to fight your way to the top,
you'll need to master two things:
boosts and terrain info.

Keep these in mind when you assemble your squad and
you might just put your opponent on the ropes.

Right, then, that's enough for now.
It's time for the heart-pounding thrills of the Master League!

Let's get things started! Gundam Fight, all set!
Ready?! GO!!!

Ladies and gentlemen,
I trust you enjoyed the Master League Gundam Fight.

Whether you're satisfied with your score or not,
I hope you at least earned something to
help you in the next event.

Well, then, that's all for now.
If Lady Luck smiles upon us,
we'll see each other again in the next Master League.

Let's close things out. All together now...
Gundam Fight, all set!
Ready?! GO!!!
